title: rubus × crassiformis
intro: Rubus × crassiformis, also known as the hybrid black raspberry or crassifolia, is a type of black raspberry that is a cross between the black raspberry (Rubus occidentalis) and the purple raspberry (Rubus idaeus). The medicinal properties of Rubus × crassiformis include its high antioxidant and anti-inflammatory content, which can help protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of consuming Rubus × crassiformis include its ability to support heart health, reduce the risk of certain cancers, and improve digestive health. Rubus × crassiformis can be prepared as a herbal tea, juice, or supplement, and is also used in jams, preserves, and other culinary products.
